violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply to have a RIFSM. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize, and must work with pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate mouse problem. Establishment is to have pest control report for inspector at the time of next inspection. Per PIC, pest control is coming weekly. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment has installed a new door. An opening was still observed on the left side of door. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply to have a RIFSM. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize, and must work with pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate mouse problem. Establishment is to have pest control report for inspector at the time of next inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment has received a new door and will be installed this week per PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply to have a RIFSM. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

Pork was observed vacuum packaged. Establishment is to stop using ROP packaging until they have approval from RIDOH. Pork was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment does not have an active pest control service. Per PIC, establishment will contact a pest control service by the end of day. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize, and must work with pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate mouse problem. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

Knives and utensils were observed being stored in between prep tables. Utensils must be stored on a clean and dry surface. Kives and utensils were moved to the 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Multiple reach-in freezers at the bar and kitchen were observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Trash was observed overfull. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizer in the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be kept free of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

The condensate from the freezer refrigeration unit was observed built up in excess in the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024
